LandingPage.vibeDescription: Lounge Brew is designed around slower browsing, where coffee, signatures, and late-night listening come together in a quieter frame. We bring you the best live acoustic sessions in the city.
LandingPage.menuCtaDescription: Discover our signature coffees, teas, and special items.

HomePage.eyebrow: Coffee lounge · live sessions · bilingual menu
HomePage.title: A tactile digital menu made to feel like a real book.
HomePage.subtitle: Server-rendered translations and localized Supabase content arrive fully synchronized before the first paint.
HomePage.mockDataNotice: Showing mock content until Supabase is connected.
HomePage.menuCoverSubtitle: Coffee, tea, signatures, and late-night listening.
HomePage.backCoverQuote: Turn the page slowly. The room sounds better that way.
HomePage.backCoverCaption: Crafted for bilingual browsing, calm reading, and slower decisions.
HomePage.emptyEvents: New sessions will be announced soon.

EventsPage.title: Upcoming sessions in a quieter frame.
EventsPage.description: This page separates live programming from the menu so each format can have its own rhythm.

JournalIndexPage.title: Stories, notes, and room atmosphere.
JournalIndexPage.description: Long-form reading belongs away from the menu. This route keeps the journal distraction-free while preserving bilingual fallback behavior.
